description: ```js // Install module by command below // $ sudo apt install node-gyp # This can be needed for iconv module in this module // $ npm install st-mysql // It would be better not to include your secret information of database in source code due to security issue as commiting to github // const query = require('st-mysql')({ host: 'localhost', user: 'ACCOUNTID', password: 'PASSWORD', database: 'DBNAME', charset: 'utf-8', flat: true, encode: false }); const stAsync = require('st-async') stAsync.set_promise(true);
name: st-mysql
